title: Animator1110's Adventure
description: Simple additions that aim to add a bit more adventure to minecraft.
body:
a datapack of all the little things i've made to make minecraft more fun for me. with the added benefit of making minecraft more adventurous.

features:
- 1 structure with 5 variants (my house)
- loot tables with maps to other POIs, to encourage adventuring to new locations, system is also designed to guide you to rarer POIs
- challenging custom advancements with unique rewards
- a few enchantments i made:
> shatter: do extra damage to enemies and inflict slowness effect, but your weapon breaks faster\
> porcelain: protection and thorns, but your armor breaks faster\
> glass cannon: do a lot of extra damage to enemies, but your bow breaks really fast\
> extra xp: while holding an item with this enchant, your xp intake is multiplied\
> blast: attacking causes explosions, pack blast protection\
> wither: attacking inflicts a wither effect\
> mending: its mending, but now with more levels!

extra xp, porcelain, and shatter cannot be enchanted with mending\
porcelain, shatter, and glass cannon cannot be enchanted with unbreaking

i added these caveats to inspire a different enchantment and weaponkeeping style from the obvious one. to maybe finally try that bane of arthropods weapon...

enjoy
